name: io.github.unitedideas/resolve
title: Resolve
description: Structured error recovery for AI agents. Returns resolution playbooks (category, backoff schedule, max retries, recovery steps) for 20+ services including OpenAI, Stripe, Postgres, and AWS.

environmentVariables.description: Resolve API key. Get a free key (500 requests/month) by calling the get_free_key tool with your email.
environmentVariables.name: RESOLVE_API_KEY
